ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "method" TEXT /* Type of machine learning algorithm used (e.g., Neural, Logistics) */,
  "params" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the model */,
  "metrics" REAL /* Performance metrics of the model (e.g., accuracy, f1-score) */,
  "rt_name" TEXT /* Name of the response transformer used (e.g., Identity, ZScore) */,
  "sl_name" TEXT /* Name of the scaler used (e.g., Identity, ZScore) */,
  "training_time" REAL /* Time taken to train the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used to train the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Model version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_rt_name FOREIGN KEY ("rt_name") REFERENCES response_transformers ("transformer_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_sl_name FOREIGN KEY ("sl_name") REFERENCES scaling_methods ("scaling_method_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "scaling_methods" (
  "scaling_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scaling method */,
  "scaling_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the scaling method (e.g., ZScore, Identity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scaling method */,
  "implementation" TEXT /* Implementation details of the scaling method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scaling_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_transformers" (
  "transformer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response transformer */,
  "transformer_name" TEXT /* Name of the response transformer (e.g., Identity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the response transformer */,
  "implementation" TEXT /* Implementation details of the response transformer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_index" INTEGER /* Index of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., csv, json) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, model trainer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, train) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, f1-score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., data scientist, model trainer, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view, train, delete) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission assignment */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
